event_info: a gentle loosener from Mukesh; full and at the pads - Abhishek moves across and then clips it off the pads; behind square on the on-side and it needed a big effort from Rizvi to prevent the boundary
on a good length and a hint of shape away from off; punched on the rise and in the gap square past point for a single
short of a good length and just outside off - Head prods across as he defended; hit high on the bat and the ball rolls to the off-side
nicely played; too full and too straight from Mukesh; on the pads and it's whipped into the gap wide of mid-on - the timing is sweet and the ball runs away to the ropes
fuller length delivery outside off - driven straight to the fielder at cover
short of a good length and well wide of off - Head leans across and then cuts it square behind point; more good work in the deep and they're kept down to a couple
excellent work from Nissanka at backward point - dropped short and wide of off; cut away to the right of backward point. Nissanka throws himself and makes a one-handed stop
slower and just outside off - a mistimed drive in front of point for a single
the slider from Rana - Head backs away and can't beat cover-point with the punch
slower and drifting across the left-hander - Head backs away on the cut and misses
the seam-up delivery; nips back into the left-hander and catches Head's inside edge on the hack; rolls backward of square on the on-side for a single
clubbed; fraction short and at the stumps - Abhishek rocks back and then musdcles the pull over mid-on; wasn't well timed; but has enough to clear the fielder in the ring
short of a good length and just outside off - Head swivels across and then hacks it through mid-wicket - the fielder in the deep slides across and keeps them down to a couple
hammered; tad too short from Mukesh - Head rocks back and then hammers the pull wide of mid-wicket; long chase for Rizvi once again and he comesd second best
full and at the stumps; driven back at the bowler - Mukesh gets a hand onto it and makes the stop
full and just outside off - Head goes hard on the drive and gets a single to long-off
banged in short as Abhishek charged down the pitch - a swing and a miss; KL thinks about a caught behind appeal; but Mukesh wasn't interested
cracking shot; back of a length and angling across the left-hander - Abhishek stays leg-sided; makes room and then slaps the cut over backward point for a boundary. 11 off the over
on a good length and pushed across the left-hander; driven through cover for a single
the slower ball goes wrong; turns out to be a juicy full-toss and it's heaved through mid-wicket; beats the man in the ring and runs away to the ropes
low full-toss on off; was another slower ball that dipped onto the right-hander - inside halved towards mid-on
thumped; another slower ball from Ngidi; but this is too full and lets Abhishek go over the top with the lofted drive; one bounce and over the ropes
slower loopy full-toss outside off - Abhishek reaches out and picks out cover with the drive
another slower ball outside off - driven into the gap wide of cover for a single
cracking shot; tossed up invitingly around off; Abhishek backs away; opens the face of the bat and then goes inside out over cover for a maximum. The timing was sweet and the ball sailed over
clubbed; pushed through quicker; but the length is short and it allows Abhishek to rock back on the pull; hammers it high over long-on
Nitish drags the length back as Abhishek came down the pitch; driven down to long-off for a single
tossed up on the leg-stump line; Head comes down the pitch and clips it to square leg
nicely bowled; sensed Head's charge - slowed down the pace and drifted it wider of off; past the tramlines though and it's called as a wide
flatter and on off - Head stays back on the drive; to the right of cover where Miller makes a diving stop
20 off the over; a big one for SRH - Head shimmies down the pitch; gets right to the pitch of the ball and then lets his hands take over; shovels it high over long-on for a maximum
slower ball outside off - Abhishek comes down the pitch and punches it wide of mid-off
another slower ball outside off - Head swipes hard and drags a thick inside edge; to the left of mid-wicket for a single
on a good length and just outside off - Abhishek went hard on the drive and mistimed it to mid-on
fuller length delivery outside off - Abhishek comes down the pitch; makes room and drives it square on the off-side for a single
a loopy full-toss - dips onto the left-hander and Head mistimes the drive over cover's head
another slower ball; but this is well past the tramlines and has been wided
lovely; Abhishek comes down the pitch; takes it on the half-volley and then lifts it nonchalantly over the bowler's head; sails into the sightscreen for a maximum
flatter and at the stumps; whipped wide of mid-on for a single
pushed through outside off - punched down to long-off for a single
fraction short and wide of off; Head backs away and cuts it in front of square on the off-side; comes back for the second
slower and at the pads; Head comes down the pitch and clips it past mid-wicket
tossed up on the leg-stump line; worked through mid-wicket for a single
pushed through on the leg-stump line; punched down to long-on for a single
fraction short and just outside off - cut away square on the off-side for a single
tossed up and spinning away from outside off; Abhishek shuffles across and lets it go
smashed; tossed up well outside off - it's right in Abhishek's arc and he lifts it back over the bowler's head; one bounce and over the ropes
dragged short b y Kuldeep; Abhishek prods across and drills it down to long-on for a single
Kuldeep tosses one around off; Head cleared his left leg on the slog; went too hard and the inside edge lobbed up off his pad
loopy delivery around off; Head leans across and then swipes it back over the bowler's head; Stubbs runs to his left and keeps them down to a couple

very full and down leg; clipped in front of square on the on-side - Abhishek Sharma runs back for the second and then puts in the dive. The throw was good; but KL fumbled and that could be a let-off for the SRH opener. Raises his half-century. Replays show that Abhishek was short had Rahul gathered the ball
tad too short and just outside off - Abhishek swivels across and then flat-bats the lofted drive over the bowler's head; sails onto the sightscreen for a maximum
flighted delivery on off; pushed down to long-on for a single
hammered; Axar slows down the pace; but it's too full and right in Head's slot - he leans across and then plays the slog-sweep; high over long-on for a maximum

ball_event: out Caught by Sameer Rizvi!! A dragdown and Head has holed out to deep mid-wicket - was pushed through quicker and on off
event_info: Head rocked back on the pull; but he doesn't get the elevation on the shot. Hard and flat; and right down Rizvi's throat at deep mid-wicket. End of a fine partnership and the players have taken the strategic break as well. Travis Head c Sameer Rizvi b Axar Patel 37(26) [4s-2 6s-2]
tossed up around off; Kishan shuffles across and pushes it down to long-on
tossed up just outside off; driven down to long-off for a single
pushed through on off; punched off the back-foot to long-off
Nitish drags the length back as Kishan came down the pitch; driven past the bowler for a single
slower and wider of off - chopped in front of square on the off-side
flatter and wider of off; well past the tramlines and has been wided
slower and wider of off; slapped down to long-off for a single
the off-break; but was short and wide of off; wou;d've been a wide had Abhishek let it go; he chases and picks out backward point with the cut
lovely; floaty delivery from Kuldeep - Kishan comes down the pitch; gets close to the ball and then drills it high over long-on for a maximum
back-to-back boundaries for Kishan - Kuldeep drifts one down leg; Kishan gets down low; rolled his wrists and then beat backward square leg with the sweep
Kuldeep; from round the wicket; tosses one down leg and it's swept backward of square on the on-side for a run
a gentle chip and Abhishek has sent it over long-off - tossed up and drifting across the left-hander - Abhishek comes down the pitch and then drives it through the line; high and over long-off
slower and at the stumps; worked down to long-on for a single

bludgeoned; tossed up well outside off and Kishan smashed it to the left of the bowler. Kuldeep did try to get his left hand around; but it flicks his finger and races away to the long-on boundary - 22 off the over
Abhishek is dealing in sixes at the moment - a leg-stump half-volley and Abhishek has nonchalantly whipped it over square leg; high and over the ropes for a maximum
fuller length delivery and well wide of off; just inside the tramlines as Abhishek let it go
the slower bouncer; but it loops over Abhishek's head; called as a wide
Natarajan goes full and outside off as Abhishek shuffled across; punched down to long-off for a single
back of a length and well wide of off; slapped off the back-foot to long-off
fuller length delivery outside off - driven square on the off-side for a single
full-toss on off and it's whipped wide of long-on - Nissanka sprints to his right in the deep; dives and keeps them down to a couple
yorker length delivery on off; squeezed to the off-side

full-toss down leg; past Abhishek's swing and is called as a wide. But the call has been reviewed by DC. Did it flick Abhishek's pads on its way? Yes; UltraEdge has a spike when the ball is next to the pad; so a successful review
the slower bouncer; but it sails high over Abhishek's head; called as a wide
nicely played; banged in short as Abhishek came down the pitch - he adjusts and then slashes it over the infield; third man is inside the ring and can only wath the ball soar away
low full-toss as Abhishek followed Abhishek - driven down to long-on for a single
fraction fuller and just outside off; pushed down to long-off for a single

a high full-toss and Abhishek has muscled it over long-on - was the attempted yorker and looked like it slipped out of Mukesh's grasp. Abhishek thinks it's high; but they don't review it for a no-ball
slower short ball outside off - swatted over mid-wicket for a single

Natarajan goes full and wide of off as Abhishek Sharma shuffled across - it's well past the tramlines; but the batter had moved across a fair way. They've reviewed the non-wide call though and they lose it

a chance and it's been put down; another reprieve for Abhishek - low full-toss outside off and it was scythed over backward point. Rana sprinted to his left in the deep; got to the ball with both hands; but he did so with hard hands and it popped out
fuller length delivery outside off; Kishan shuffles across and miscues the drive to long-off
Natarajan keeps it full and well wide of off; but Abhishek hasn't moved this time and the ball is past the tramline; called as a wide
smashed; a wide full-toss and Abhishek pummels the drive over extra-cover; moves into the 90s with the boundary
Natarajan nails the wide yorker now; squeezed off the inside half to long-on
thumped; too full from Nitish; it's right in the slot and Abhishek hammers it back over the bowler's head; has enough to clear the ropes on the full

a second IPL hundred for Abhishek Sharma and it's come in front of his family - swivels the bat to all sides of the ground and is engulfed with a warm hug from his partner - a long hop and it was duly pulled over deep mid-wicket for a maximum
DC are cracking under pressure; it's Stubbs with a fumble now - low full-toss and was punched down to the left of long-off - Stubbs moved to his left and then let the ball slip through his hands

ball_event: out Ishan Kishan Run Out!! Ishan Kishan was backing up a long way and he has been run-out at the bowler's end. Was a well flighted delivery on off and Abhishek drove it back at the bowler - Nitish bent down low and then cleverly deflected the ball off his hands to the stumps - Ishan Kishan was a long way out and can't get back in time. Time for the smart replays and the SRH captain is sent on his way. Ishan Kishan run out (Nitish Rana) 25(13) [4s-2 6s-1]
event_info: out Ishan Kishan Run Out!! Ishan Kishan was backing up a long way and he has been run-out at the bowler's end. Was a well flighted delivery on off and Abhishek drove it back at the bowler - Nitish bent down low and then cleverly deflected the ball off his hands to the stumps - Ishan Kishan was a long way out and can't get back in time. Time for the smart replays and the SRH captain is sent on his way. Ishan Kishan run out (Nitish Rana) 25(13) [4s-2 6s-1]
Abhishek continues to motor along; tad too full and right in the slot - Abhishek clears his front-foot and then swipes it over long-off; a clean hit and the ball sails into the stands
tossed up and drifting onto the pads; Abhishek looks to flick and gets an inside edge onto the on-side

slower delivery outside off; Sharma comes down the track and lofts it to sweeper cover; he had mistimed it; but luckily it falls in no man's land; a fumble in the deep and they come back for the second
bowls it wide and full outside off; Abhishek had backed away; but too wide
length delivery angling across; it was close to the wide line; SRH reviewed for it; but the original decision stays
fuller and outside off; Abhishek was bit early into the shot and misses it
fuller length and outside off; no room whatsoever; Sharma drives it down to sweeper cover
this is good bowling; speared in full on middle; cramped for any room; Klaasen eases it down to long-on

terrific effort by Miller in the deep; he's saved a certain six here; it was a low full-toss; Abhishek comes down the track and lofts it through the line towards long off; Miller covers good ground and pushes the ball inside the boundary as it was going over the fence; top effort from Miller
this is poor bowling; short and wide outside off; Abhishek walks down the track; get on top of the bounce and cuts it over the fielder to third man
just over the fielder; length outside off; Abhishek reaches out and hits it in the air to deep extra cover
speared in full on middle; Abhishek flicks it to deep mid-wicket
low full-toss; difficult delivery to put it away; Klaasen drags it down to deep mid-wicket
another low full-toss; Abhishek had backed away to the leg side and plays the inside out shot to deep extra cover

this is cheeky from Klaasen; 200 up for SRH; low full-toss again; Klaasen was expecting the delivery; stands in the crease; gets down and reverse paddles it over the fielder to third man; runs coming thick and fast for SRH
slower and fuller outside off; Abhishek was bit early into the shot and misses it; well bowled from Ngidi

it was a full delivery wide outside off; Abhishek looks to squeeze it away and misses it; Rahul looks like heard some sound and convinces the skipper to go for the review; snicko suggest no edge and DC lose a review
fuller length outside off Abhishek drives it down to sweeper cover
thumped away; top shot; slower full-toss; Klaasen stands tall in the crease; picks it and hammers it to deep extra cover; nice clean hit; what power from those wrists
classic Klaasen on display here; it was a fuller delivery; Klaasen gets underneath the delivery and sends it packing over deep extra cover; immense power on that
right up in the block hole; Klaasen digs it down to long-off
slower short delivery; Klaasen slaps it hard to sweeper cover; rare occasion he couldn't connect
full and drifting down the leg side; he
full and outisde leg stump; Abhishek had backed away and lofts it ober the bowler's head to long-off
slower short delivery; well bowled; Klaasen slaps it to sweeper cover; only a single
well bowled; right up in the block hole as Abhishek had backed away to the leg side; only manages to push it back to the bowler; a rare dot ball
speared in full on middle; Abhishek drives it down to long-on; excellent from Natarajan
this is a terrific from Natarajan; just 6 off the penultimate over; once again right up in the block hole; Klaasen digs it down to long-on
four more; fuller and slower on middle; Klaasen clears his left leg and lofts it inside out to deep extra cover; the partnership between Heinrich Klaasen and Abhishek Sharma is now 50
this is a ridiculous shot; it's an almost yorker; Klaasen gets under the ball nicely and lofts it over long-off; strong bottom hand and it just sailed over the fence
round the wicket now; low full toss on the leg stump; Klaasen attempts the paddle shot; but doesn't get it off the meat of the bat and the ball goes towards backward square leg
nicely done; wide full-toss; Abhishek reaches out for it and slices it over the fielder to third man; excellent placement from the centurion
speared in full; cramped for any room; Abhishek digs it out to cover
he gets it away; even the mistimed shot have gone for boundary tonight; it was full and wide outside off; Klaasen reaches out for it and slices it to deep backward point; fabulous hitting from SRH
hint a shape into the right hander; good start; on a length and shaping in; Nissanka gets right behind the line and defends it
oh this one swung in sharply; Nissanka was rooted to the crease and the ball goes off the inside edge to square leg; he's off the mark in a streaky fashion
back of a length and targeting the body; Rahul pushes it back to the bowler
full and swinging in; Rahul works it to deep square leg
first maximum for the Capitals; full and shaping in; Nissanka was anticipating that; gets under the ball and hits it with the swing over deep mid-wicket; it just went over the ropes
on off and shaping in; Nissanka pushes it to point; decent start from Madushanka
slower short delivery wide outside off; Rahul was early into the shot and misses it
pitched up this time; hint of some away shape; Rahul drives it straight to the fielder at mid off
little flick of the wrists and it has gone all the way; full and just outside off; Rahul picks it and flicks it off his wrist over deep mid-wicket
over mid on now; full and outside off; Rahul walks down the track and lofts it over the fielder to long-on; he gets it off the middle of the bat and it raced away
too close to cut; on a length in the channel around off stump; Rahul goes for the slash and misses it; it kept a bit low
angling in from outside off; Rahul works it away to deep mid-wicket
well disguised slower delivery; Nissanka was early into the shot; almost missed it and the ball trickles off the inside edge to square leg

ball_event: out Caught by (sub)Liam Livingstone!! Debut wicket for Madushanka
event_info: he's got his countryman; it was a length delivery angling across; Nissanka had backed away to the leg side; but hits it straight to Livingstone at mid-off; DC lose an early wicket. Pathum Nissanka c (sub)Liam Livingstone b Dilshan Madushanka 8(6) [6s-1]
well directed short delivery on the body; Rana was surprised by the bounce; takes his eyes off the ball and the ball goes off the gloves past the diving keeper to fine leg
excellent stop from Harshal in the deep; it was full and on middle; Rana drives it down to long-on; Harshal slides well and pulls it back in
excellent slower delivery; Rana was early into the across the line heave and misses it
back of a length and down the leg side; Rana misses it
just short of the fielder at mid-on; well disguised slower delivery; Rana looks to go over mid on; but ends up dragging it short of the fielder
slower and drifting into the pads; Rana works it away to deep square leg
change of pace again; but slightly short and outside off; Rana had ample time to pick his spot and cuts it away to sweeper cover
yorker length just outside off; cramped for any room; Rana digs it out towards the off side
overpitched and outside off; Rana drives it to extra cover; the fielder comes in quickly and cuts it off
angling in from outside off; Rahul eases it down to long-on
they need more of these; another slower delivery; bit fuller; Rana picks it and lofts it over deep extra cover; poor bowling from Reddy
stand and deliver; full and around off; Rana backs away and smashes it past the bowler straight down the ground
back of a length and outside off; Rahul guides it to short third man
back of a length and around the off stump; Rana punches it square of the wicket

dropped! oh he's put down a simple chance; well disguised slower delivery; this one stopped on him a bit as Rahul was completely foxed by the delivery and hits it back towards the bowler; who shells it; it bounced off his hands and he couldn't hold onto it on the second attempt
this is rubbing salt to the wound; pitched up and on middle; right in the arc; Rahul picks it and lofts it straight through the line straight down the ground for a maximum
angling into the pads; Rahul flicks it to short fine leg
banged in short on the stump; bit high over the batsman as he ducks under it
135.9ks good length ball around off; Rahul's weight is on the back foot and he chips the flick to long-on
there is a deep extra cover in place. But Rana evaded him comfortably. Slower ball but the length is short; Rana gets under and slashes it over the cover-point region; one bounce and over the ropes
backs away early and Sakib follows him; no room on offer and Rana checks his shot; lobs it to the left of the bowler and straight to mid-on
this is excellent from Sakib. He spots Rana making room and goes short; well-directed bouncer and Rana does well to sway out of the line. That ball was following him..
pace off delivery and Rana did not pick it; he was early into the cross-batted shot; adjusts and pats it to short third
134.6ks back of a length delivery; Rana punches it straight to extra cover
133.5ks fullish delivery on off; Rahul drives to long-on
96.3ks dipping full toss; Rana swipes across the line and mishits it towards long-on; easy brace
sprays it outside off; no chance for Rana to reach that; wide called
slower bouncer around off; Rana takes it on and the ball lobs over him. Fair delivery deems the square leg umpire
yorker but drifts down leg; Rana stays inside the line and misses the glance; another wide
Madushanka is losing his radar while attempting variations. Short ball down leg; Rana does not connect with the hook

he gets away with this one. Rana looks at the umpire; thinks about the review and decides against it. Full and down leg; not sure Rana moved as he attempted the glance; but the umpire does not signal it a wide. Madushanka is lucky there
speared into the blockhole; Rana digs it to mid-wicket and crosses over
119ks slower delivery leg-lined; Rahul flicks it to deep square leg
starts with a googly; it is not short but Rahul goes back to pull; gets an under-edge towards short fine
97.1ks flatter and not much flight; Rana sits down and sweeps to deep square leg
96.2ks dragged short and this time Rahul middles the pull; but not in the gap as Abhishek tidies up from deep mid-wicke

this time the short ball is punished. It was the wrong 'un and turns in nicely into the left-hander; Rana rocks back and pulls it in front of square. He gets enough for the ball to land beyond the rope

back to back sixes. Reddy does well to get to the ball but he can't throw it back into the playing area. Another dragdown by Shivang; this time Rana connects better with the pull and still has trouble clearing the rope. Reddy moves to his left from deep mid-wicket and leaps; goes with both hands but does not hang on or get a proper piece of the ball

Rana loves batting against the spinners and he has just taken Shivang apart. This is given a bit of flight; Rana stays leg-side and goes with the spin; inside out over extra cover and beats the long-off fielder in the deep
fullish delivery close to off; Rahul drags the drive off the inner half to long-on
134.8ks full pitcher outside off; Rana goes hard on the drive and mistimes it to long-off
short ball banged into the wicket; Rahul pulls it in front of square; wide of long-on and picks up a couple
122.2ks slower ball bowled into the surface; Rahul looks for the upper cut but does not connect
129.1ks short of length delivery; Rahul pulls it wide of long-on and picks up couple more

he missed this shot a couple of balls ago but not this time. Another off-pace short of length delivery; Rahul backs away and has the width to free his arms; upper cuts and clears deep backward point with ease

fifty for Rana. First of the season for him. He was scratchy to start but that over from Shivang has given him the momentum. Full and angled across; Rana goes hard on the slice it behind square; splitting backward point and short third perfectly
115.5ks slower ball slanted across; Rana makes a bit of room and flays it over backward point; just manages to clear the inner ring and beats a diving Shivang near the rope
off-pace length delivery; Rana waits and drives to sweeper cover

ball_event: out Caught by Abhishek Sharma!! Rahul stands there in disbelief. He has gifted his wicket away. Sakib Hussain is a lucky man. This is not a wicket-taking delivery. This is a six-hitting ball - full toss on the pads
event_info: Rahul could have hit that anywhere; instead he miscues the heave and picks out Abhishek at deep backward square. Just when he was starting to up the tempo; Rahul departs. And the partnership is broken. Rahul c Abhishek Sharma b Sakib Hussain 37(23) [4s-1 6s-3]
137.3ks back of a length around off; Rizvi opens the bat face and looks to steer it to third man; beaten on the outside-edge. The ball straightened a touch and that's what beat Rizvi
140.1ks fullish delivery around off; Rizvi pushes it firmly to cover

ball_event: out Caught by Abhishek Sharma!! He's everywhere. Second catch for Abhishek. Both set batters gone in consecutive overs. Sunrisers Hyderabad right on top now. Fullish delivery angled across
event_info: Rana looks to loft down the ground and gets it nowhere close to the middle. The ball was dying in front of Abhishek who charged in from long-on; slid forward and gobbled it up just above the ground. A good knock comes to an end. Nitish Rana c Abhishek Sharma b Eshan Malinga 57(30) [4s-7 6s-3]

ball_event: out Bowled!! Cleaned up! Two in two for Malinga. He's on a hat-trick. The stadium has turned into a sea of orange with the flags being waved around. This is a peach first up. Good length delivery
event_info: Miller is rooted to the crease and tries to defend; but the ball holds its line; takes the inside-edge and deflects off the back thigh onto the stumps. Miller was not expecting that. He departs for a golden duck. David Miller b Eshan Malinga 0(1)
140.2ks attempted yorker but ends up as full toss; Stubbs knocks it to mid-on
full and attacking the stumps; hint of inward curl and Stubbs squeezes it off the inside-edge to deep square leg. He wanted a second but Rizvi sends him back
142.5ks full and slanting in; Rizvi flicks it through mid-wicket
bit of yes-no; but no harm done. Very full delivery; Stubbs toe-ends the drive to mid-off. He took a start and so did Rizvi; but they decide against the single
enough to clear long-on. First ball for Rizvi against Shivang and he takes him on. Googly around off; Rizvi lofts through the line and manages to evade the fielder on the rope
wrong 'un outside off; Rizvi steers it straight to short third
quicker and drifted across; Rizvi goes hard on the drive and mistimes to long-off
86.1ks flighted googly on off; Stubbs checks the drive and chips it to long-off
short and outside off; Rizvi attempts the pull but he was fetching the shot; toe-ends it to long-on
tossed up on off; Stubbs moves around before knocking it to cover
shot! 118.5ks slower ball angled across; Rizvi stays leg-side and clears his front leg; goes inside out over extra cover. Not off the middle but enough to clear the 30-yard circle
134.8ks good length ball on leg; Rizvi eases it to long-on
137.2ks back of a length delivery; Stubbs punches it to deep mid-wicket
nicely done! Slower short ball; Rizvi uses the angle going across him - stands tall and ramps it fine; beats short third's dive inside the ring and picks up another boundary
136.1ks fullish delivery around off; Rizvi makes room and drives to long-off
135.4ks good length ball on off; Stubbs eases it down the ground and sticks to a single
another over that starts with a boundary. Reddy attempts the yorker but misses it by a long way; Stubbs gets hold of the full toss and thumps it straight down the ground. Just clearing the rope..
low full toss outside off; Stubbs reaches and toe-ends the drive to long-off
missed out there. Full toss; Rizvi premeditated the sweep and misses; struck on the pad outside off
132.8ks yorker outside off; Rizvi jams it square on the off-side and there's a fumble from the fielder coming in from the deep. The pair pick up the second
this is turning into a good over. Second six in the over. Slower ball; but right in the slot for Rizvi to have a free swing of the arms; he launches it high and all the way over long-on
full toss outside off; Rizvi shuffles across and mistimes the heave to deep mid-wicket

SRH lose a review. That was poor from Salil Arora. Sakib was not interested but Salil convinced Ishan to use the review. Yorker around leg; Rizvi clears his front leg and ekes out a thin edge onto the back pad. The impact was around leg and the ball rolls towards short fine
strays down leg and Stubbs makes him pay. This was a pace on delivery; so Stubbs uses that and flicks it wide of short fine; beats the fielder's dive and picks up the boundary
very full delivery around off; Stubbs eases it to long-on
slower ball close to off; Rizvi angles it to backward point and crosses over
132.8ks full and angling in; Stubbs pushes it past Rizvi and switches over
134.7ks full and slanting in; Rizvi moves across and attempts the pick-up shot; toe-ends it to deep mid-wicket
full and curling in; Rizvi clears his left leg and whips it to deep mid-wicket

shot! We saw Klaasen playing a similar shot against Natarajan; now Stubbs has done it to Malinga. Low full toss on the stumps; Stubbs bends down and reverse scoops it over short third. The ball almost travels the distance
not off the middle and Stubbs settles with a brace. Low full toss tailing in; Stubbs crouches low and repeats the reverse lap; gets it off the toe-end and clears Salil Arora behind the stumps

Stubbs getting a move on. Short of length delivery; Stubbs stands tall to get on top of the bounce and smashes the pull towards deep mid-wicket. Abhishek runs to his right and slides; but can't stop it cleanly and the ball rolls into the rope

ball_event: out Caught by Sakib Hussain!! Malinga has the last say. Third wicket for him. And he's elated. Stubbs had success playing the reverse scoop and he perishes playing that shot. This was the slower ball from Malinga as he spotted Stubbs shape to play the reverse
event_info: held the length back as well and Stubbs could not generate power to clear short third; Sakib moves to his left and takes a good catch. Tristan Stubbs c Sakib Hussain b Eshan Malinga 27(16) [4s-3 6s-1]
walks down the wicket and gets a back of a length delivery; knocks it to long-on and gets off the mark
101.8ks short of length outside off; Ashutosh punches in front of square and picks out deep extra cover

dropped! Aniket has made a mess. Harsh tosses it up; lands it full and lures Rizvi into the big shot. The ball spins a bit and Rizvi slices the inside out loft towards deep extra cover. Aniket comes in from the rope; bends down and goes reverse cup; the ball does not stuck and goes to ground
flatter and quicker; Rizvi flat-bats it over extra cover; just a single

fired it outside off; Ashutosh shapes to play the reverse lap; but is beaten for pace and struck on the back pad. Another poor review from SRH. The impact was clearly outside off and they still challenged the onfield call. Hang on! Ball-tracking shows umpire's call on impact and wickets hitting. So; SRH don't lose the review..
drifting in with the angle; Ashutosh knocks it down the ground and pockets a couple
just 10 from the over. SRH will take that. Harsh loses his length; feeds it in the slot and Ashutosh pounces; pumps it down the ground and does not quite get the distance to clear the rope
full and tailing in; Rizvi stays deep in the crease and mistimes the heave to long-on
141.4ks very full delivery on leg; Ashutosh moves away and squeezes the drive straight down the ground; calls for two and gets it comfortably
slower ball outside off; Ashutosh shuffles across and sweeps; the ball dips and sneaks past his swinging blade
139.6ks full and tailing in; Ashutosh clears his front leg and swings across the line; squirts a thick inside-edge towards short fine and Madushanka dives over the ball and allows it to escape
slower bouncer; too short and too high; Ashutosh attempts the ramp and misses; wide called for height
completely lost control of the slower ball; sprays it way outside off and Ashutosh has no chance. There was even a check if the ball landed within the playing area; it did and hence only a wide
nails the low full toss; Ashutosh brings his bat down and jams it to the left of Malinga

ball_event: out Caught by Aniket Verma!! Malinga finishes with a 4-fer. Excellent spell from him. His figures read - 4-0-32-4. In a high-scoring game those are incredible numbers. The off-cutter outside off
event_info: Ashutosh did not spot it and is completely deceived; his bottom hand comes off the bat handle and he drags the heave to long-on. Aniket dropped one in the previous over but makes no mistake this time. Ashutosh Sharma c Aniket Verma b Eshan Malinga 14(10) [4s-2]
fullish delivery around off; Rizvi chips the drive wide of sweeper cover and races back for the second
off-cutter that breaks in; cramps Rizvi for room and he fends it off the glove down the pitch
slower ball and Rizvi picked it late; opened the bat face and guided it to short third
off-pace delivery around leg; Axar turns it round the corner and crosses over
low full toss outside off; Rizvi drives it straight to long-off
136ks good length ball; no room for Axar and he stabs it to backward point

ball_event: out Caught by Nitish Reddy!! The final rites are being performed. Axar has no option but to go for the big shots and decrease the margin of defeat. He tries to heave Dubey into the leg-side but does not get it off the middle. Reddy comes well in from the deep mid-wicket fence and hangs onto a good catch. Axar Patel c Nitish Reddy b Harsh Dubey 2(3)
event_info: out Caught by Nitish Reddy!! The final rites are being performed. Axar has no option but to go for the big shots and decrease the margin of defeat. He tries to heave Dubey into the leg-side but does not get it off the middle. Reddy comes well in from the deep mid-wicket fence and hangs onto a good catch. Axar Patel c Nitish Reddy b Harsh Dubey 2(3)
stifled appeal for LBW. Kuldeep crouches low and attempts the sweep; misses and the ball rolls next to the pitch. Rizvi crosses over. The umpire gives it as run; so maybe there was an inside-edge
flatter delivery outside off; Rizvi cross-bats it straight to long-off
1 run; comes down the track and is met by a short of length delivery; misses the tuck and the ball deflects off the thigh pad

ball_event: out Caught by Dilshan Madushanka!! Second wicket for Dubey. He was held back and is bowling only his second over
event_info: but is getting the rewards for the work done by his team mates. He goes round the wicket; fires it across the right-hander and Rizvi can't get under the big shot; heaves it high and towards deep mid-wicket; Madushanka settles under it and takes it safely. Sameer Rizvi c Dilshan Madushanka b Harsh Dubey 41(28) [4s-2 6s-2]

ball_event: out Caught by Dilshan Madushanka!! Sunrisers Hyderabad win by 47 runs. This is a comprehensive win. Dubey slows it up
event_info: teases Ngidi into the big shot and induces the false shot. The slog is miscued towards deep mid-wicket. Madushanka runs to his left and takes a good catch. He was on the move when he took that. Lungi Ngidi c Dilshan Madushanka b Harsh Dubey 0(1)
